expectations.text: The output contains exactly 3 user stories and does not invent UI stories or browser verification.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Personal Access Token Backend",
  "branchName": "personal-access-token-backend",
  "description": "Add backend support for personal access tokens.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add hashed token storage with revokedAt",
      "description": "As a developer, I want hashed token storage with revokedAt default null so token lifecycle is managed safely.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Token storage persists hash and revokedAt default null.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_personal_access_tokens.sql"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 1
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add create-token server action",
      "description": "As a developer, I want create-token server action validating label length and returning plaintext token once.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Action validates label length and returns plaintext token one time.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/createPersonalAccessToken.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 2
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add revoke-token server action",
      "description": "As a developer, I want revoke-token server action that marks token revoked without deleting record.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Action sets revokedAt when revoking token.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/revokePersonalAccessToken.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 2
    }
  ]
}
